title: HU19 2BZ, K. Fresh Ltd: environmental permit issued – EPR/CP3025LX/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: K. Fresh Ltd   Installation name: Willow View Farm   Permit number: EPR/CP3025LX/A001   "
